parameters.query: INSERT INTO kb_documents (doc_id, owner_chat_id, title, mime, sha256, source) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), $1, $2, $3, $4, 'taris_upload') ON CONFLICT (sha256) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title RETURNING doc_id::text, (xmax = 0) AS is_new
INSERT INTO kb_chunks (doc_id, chunk_idx, section, text, tokens, embedding, metadata) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, length($4)/4, $5::vector, '{}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING chunk_id

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ doc_id: $input.first().json.doc_id, n_chunks: $input.first().json.totalChunks, n_embedded: $input.first().json.totalChunks, parse_time_ms: Date.now() - $input.first().json.startMs, filename: $input.first().json.filename }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO kb_documents (doc_id, owner_chat_id, title, mime, sha256, source) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), $1, $2, $3, $4, 'taris_upload') ON CONFLICT (sha256) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title RETURNING doc_id::text, (xmax = 0) AS is_new
INSERT INTO kb_chunks (doc_id, chunk_idx, section, text, tokens, embedding, metadata) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, length($4)/4, $5::vector, '{}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING chunk_id

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ doc_id: $('Split Chunks').first().json.doc_id, n_chunks: $('Split Chunks').first().json.totalChunks, n_embedded: $('Split Chunks').first().json.totalChunks, parse_time_ms: Date.now() - $('Split Chunks').first().json.startMs, filename: $('Split Chunks').first().json.filename }) }}
